package rulecoverage

func PositiveFindAllThenManualPaginateInGo() string {
    ruleID := "find_all_then_manual_paginate_in_go"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "All rows fetched and then sliced in Go instead of using database-level pagination."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
